subcodes.first_line: The mention of God to one among His loved ones, that he may stand firm in the Cause of his Lord and soar upon the wings of detachment unto the heights of His heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله احدا من احبائه لیستقیم علی امر ربه و یطیر بجناحین الانقطاع الی هوآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
